channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: These tiny holes could change how the world cleans water
item.description: A new nature-inspired membrane uses perfectly uniform one-nanometer pores to filter molecules with remarkable precision. The technology could transfor...

item.title: A legendary golden fabric lost for 2,000 years has returned
item.description: Researchers in South Korea have recreated the legendary âsea silkâ once prized by emperors, using fibers from a clam cultivated in Korean coastal wate...

item.title: Neanderthal DNA may have contributed to human language development
item.description: A small set of ancient genetic switches may have played a key role in enabling human language, researchers suggest.

item.title: China's JUNO neutrino detector achieves first major breakthrough
item.description: The underground JUNO observatory in China has made its first major scientific advance, achieving one of the most precise measurements of neutrino properties.
